nodes.name: Eremomela
nodes.summary: Eremomela（Eremomela）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Yellow-vented eremomela、Yellow-bellied eremomela、Senegal eremomela等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Green-backed eremomela
nodes.summary: Green-backed eremomela（Eremomela canescens）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Green-backed eremomela。

nodes.name: Green-backed eremomela
nodes.summary: The green-backed eremomela (Eremomela canescens) is a member of the Cisticolidae. This bird is a common resident breeder in tropical Africa from Kenya and Ethiopia to Cameroon. This tiny passerine is typically found in open woodland. The green-backed eremomela builds a cup-shaped nest of leaves and silk low in a bush or tree. The normal clutch is two eggs. References
